infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Crimestoppers needs camera access to capture photo and video evidence of incidents.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Crimestoppers needs microphone access to record audio with video evidence.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Crimestoppers needs your location to tag evidence with precise coordinates.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Crimestoppers needs photo library access to save captured evidence.

plugins.cameraPermission: Crimestoppers needs camera access to capture photo and video evidence of incidents.
plugins.microphonePermission: Crimestoppers needs microphone access to record audio with video evidence.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Crimestoppers needs your location to tag evidence with precise coordinates.

plugins.photosPermission: Crimestoppers needs photo library access to save captured evidence.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Crimestoppers needs permission to save evidence photos to your device.
